llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two changes announced: (1) Action item 14.1 moved to after 12.1; (2) Garfield single plan for student achievement pulled from agenda for later discussion
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve. I'll second roll call, please. Trustee weekly. Aye. Trustee McAvoy? Aye. Trustee Wells. Aye. Vice President Lawson. Aye. President Marcus. Aye.

items.intro_words: Good evening, everyone. Roll call, please.
Trustee Weekley. Present. Trustee McAvoy? Present.
We're moving on to item four. Reconvene to regular session.
Item eight, oral communication. Do we have any oral communication?
Okay, moving on to item nine, bond program consent items.
And moving on to discussion. Items 12.1, Measure T, Bond financing oversight overview.
So, Catherine, thank you so much for all you do and for all three of you.
And moving on with the Agenda 14.1 which is it was moved
Okay, so item 13, consent. Item. Can I please get a motion?
Action Items 14.2, Adoption of Resolution Number 25, Determination of Order
Board and superintendent reports. I have nothing to report.
So moving to item 16, information. 16.1, Redwood City School District review
So item 17, correspondence. I know we got a lot of emails.
And then. So 18 other business suggested items for future agendas.
And then board meeting calendar. Are there any changes?
Well, with that said, someone wants to make a motion to adjourn
